home.headline: Twenty-five years of craft. Zero templates.
home.subline: Palma Design is a Vienna design studio. Graphic design since the late nineties — logos, identities, print — and websites written in code with AI, engineered to be found.

work.title: Graphic design & identity
work.body: Logos and marks, brand identities, print and campaign graphics — twenty-five years of visual work, from sketch to press.

work.title: Websites, written in code
work.body: Designed in the studio, hand-coded with Claude — like this one. Fast static sites engineered to be found by Google and quoted by AI assistants. No page-builder tax.

work.title: Design in the age of AI
work.body: AI collapsed the cost of producing design. It didn't produce taste. The journal is where we work out what that means — for the craft and for the people who buy it.

home.quote: AI made producing design cheap. It made knowing what's good expensive.

services.headline: What we design.
services.intro: One studio, two crafts: the visual work a brand is made of, and websites designed and written in code. Both from the same pair of hands, so nothing gets lost between the designer and the developer.

offerings.title: Brand & graphic design
offerings.body: Logos and marks, full brand identities, print and campaign graphics — grounded in twenty-five years of shipped work, not mood boards.
offerings.more: Typical projects: a logo and the system around it (type, color, usage), print pieces that still have to survive a press check, and campaign graphics with one clear idea. You get final artwork plus the source files — everything is yours.

offerings.title: Websites, designed & hand-coded
offerings.body: Static, high-performance sites — designed in the studio and written in code with Claude. Engineered for search and AI search from the first line of HTML.
offerings.more: No WordPress, no page builders, no plugin sprawl. Clean HTML that Google and AI assistants can actually read, full SEO and schema layer, and an editing interface so you can change your own content. It's the exact setup running behind this very site.

notes: Websites start at around €3,000; design work is scoped per brief. We scope honestly: if a smaller piece serves you better, we'll say so.
Every website comes with optional Hosting & Care — hosting, updates and support for a flat monthly fee.
Need a client portal or internal tool instead? That's our dedicated app practice: softrexperts.com.

hosting.headline: Designed, then kept running.
hosting.intro: A website isn't done when it ships — it's done when it's still fast, secure and current a year later. Hosting & Care keeps your site that way, for a flat monthly fee, so you never think about infrastructure.

points.title: Hosting & uptime
points.body: Fast global hosting, HTTPS, backups and monitoring. If something breaks, we see it before you do.

points.title: Updates & small changes
points.body: Content updates, design tweaks and small changes handled without a new project every time.

points.title: Support & training
points.body: A direct line to the studio, plus training so you can edit your own content confidently.

hosting.note: Clean handoff, always: if you ever want to take the site in-house, it transfers to your own accounts — code, content and design files included. No lock-in.

studio.headline: One designer. Three decades of tools.
body: Palma Design is led by Harald Palma — twenty-five years of graphic design, 80+ clients across the DACH region and worldwide. The tools kept changing: drawing boards, repro film, desktop publishing, the web, and now AI. The craft underneath never did.

Today the studio does two things: the visual work a brand is made of, and websites designed and then written in code with Claude. Same eye on both, so the identity and the site that carries it are never designed by different people.

principles.title: Taste over trend
principles.body: Trends expire; hierarchy, type and one clear idea don't. We design things you won't need to redesign in two years.

principles.title: Design and code, one pair of hands
principles.body: The person who designs the site writes it. Nothing gets lost in a handoff, because there isn't one.

principles.title: No templates, no lock-in
principles.body: Every piece starts from your brief, not a theme. And everything we make — artwork, source files, code — is yours to keep.

contact.headline: Tell us what needs designing.
contact.intro: A brand, a piece of print, a website — tell us roughly what it's for and any deadline you're working to. We scope honestly and reply personally.

faqs.a: We're a design studio in Vienna doing two things: graphic design — logos, brand identities, print and campaign graphics — and custom websites that we design and then write in code. Twenty-five years of design behind both.

Designed in the studio, then hand-coded as fast static sites with Claude — no WordPress, no page builders, no templates. Clean HTML with a full SEO and schema layer, engineered to be found by Google and read by AI assistants. This site runs on exactly that setup.

faqs.q: How much does a project cost?
faqs.a: Websites start at around €3,000; graphic design is scoped per brief. We scope honestly up front — if a smaller piece serves you better, we'll tell you.

faqs.q: Do you host and maintain the websites you build?
faqs.a: Yes. Hosting & Care is a flat monthly fee covering hosting, updates, monitoring, support and training — with a clean handoff if you ever want to take the site in-house.

faqs.q: Do you also build apps, portals or internal tools?
faqs.a: Not under this roof. App and portal work lives at softrexperts.com — our dedicated practice for that. Palma Design is the design studio: graphics, brands and coded websites.

faqs.q: Where are you based, and who do you work with?
faqs.a: Vienna — working across the DACH region and worldwide, in English, German and Spanish. Most work runs remotely; on-site where it makes sense.

footer.lead: Got a brand, a graphic or a website that needs a designer? Let's talk.
